project_type: Expo 54 / React Native 0.81 mobile app with TypeScript
test_framework: Playwright e2e (web export), plus lint+typecheck as static validation
test_command: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
verification_instructions: Run npm run typecheck to confirm no type errors after adding new files
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon, no native device builds. Validation via typecheck and lint only.
contribution_requirements: Follow IIG theme palette from constants/theme.ts. Use react-native-paper components. Tab files in app/(tabs)/. Use @/ path aliases.
key_patterns: Tabs are single TSX files in app/(tabs)/. Icons use IconSymbol with SF Symbol names mapped to MaterialIcons. Colors via useColorScheme + Colors[scheme]. Paper theme via constants/paper-theme.ts. Hooks in hooks/, lib code in lib/.
directory_structure: app/(tabs)/ = tab screens, components/ = reusable UI, constants/ = theme/colors, hooks/ = custom hooks, lib/ = utilities, assets/ = static assets, providers/ = React context providers
